response.justification: Aisha is an exceptionally strong candidate with over a decade of experience deeply aligned with the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Java, AWS, and Kubernetes). Her recent work specifically includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly addressing a niche requirement, while her extensive background in building testing frameworks ensures top-tier engineering practices.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud/containerized deployments
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Exceptional testing and TDD background, including creating frameworks and teaching courses
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, though testing fundamentals are extremely strong
History of relatively short 1-2 year tenures across several previous roles
Current Staff and Founder titles may indicate she is looking for more architectural authority than a standard Senior IC role offers

key_factors.factor: Core stack and AI agent experience
